'''kashuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waaater|waaater]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waaater|waaater]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kashuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæshihith|kæshihith]] || [[word:kæshihij|kæshihij]] || [[word:kæshihish|kæshihish]] || [[word:kæshihi|kæshihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kashushuhuth|kashushuhuth]] || [[word:kashushuhuj|kashushuhuj]] || [[word:kashushuhush|kashushuhush]] || [[word:kashushuhu|kashushuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kashuhuth|kashuhuth]] || [[word:kashuhuj|kashuhuj]] || [[word:kashuhush|kashuhush]] || [[word:kashuhu|kashuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kashufhuth|kashufhuth]] || [[word:kashufhuj|kashufhuj]] || [[word:kashufhush|kashufhush]] || [[word:kashufhuf|kashufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kashuhuthu|kashuhuthu]] || [[word:kashuhuju|kashuhuju]] || [[word:kashuhushu|kashuhushu]] || [[word:kashuhuku|kashuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kashuhuth|kashuhuth]] || [[word:kashuhuj|kashuhuj]] || [[word:kashuhush|kashuhush]] || [[word:kashuhu|kashuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kashuhuthul|kashuhuthul]] || [[word:kashuhujul|kashuhujul]] || [[word:kashuhushul|kashuhushul]] || [[word:kashuhukul|kashuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kashuhuthuthu|kashuhuthuthu]] || [[word:kashuhujuju|kashuhujuju]] || [[word:kashuhushushu|kashuhushushu]] || [[word:kashuhuku|kashuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kashuhuthun|kashuhuthun]] || [[word:kashuhujun|kashuhujun]] || [[word:kashuhushun|kashuhushun]] || [[word:kashuhukun|kashuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kashuhuthuoro|kashuhuthuoro]] || [[word:kashuhujuoro|kashuhujuoro]] || [[word:kashuhushuoro|kashuhushuoro]] || [[word:kashuhukuoro|kashuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
